Operation 'deleteCredential' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. The current description is too minimal and lacks critical context for AI agent decision-making. It doesn't explain: (1) what domain and username parameters are required, (2) the permanent nature of deletion and its consequences, (3) authentication requirements, (4) what happens if the credential doesn't exist. The improved description clarifies the operation's scope, side effects (SMTP operations will fail), and prerequisites, enabling AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation.

data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and lacks critical context for AI agent decision-making. It doesn't explain: (1) what domain and username parameters are required, (2) the permanent nature of deletion and its consequences, (3) authentication requirements, (4) what happens if the credential doesn't exist. The improved description clarifies the operation's scope, side effects (SMTP operations will fail), and prerequisites, enabling AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation.
